reasoning: 2-hexyldecyl p-hydroxybenzoate is an ester of p-hydroxybenzoic acid (a para-substituted phenol) with a branched long-chain alcohol (2-hexyldecanol), making it a p-hydroxybenzoic acid alkyl ester (a paraben-type compound). This fits directly under the 'p-Hydroxybenzoic acid alkyl esters' direct parent.
